title: Fix dashboard design group rows invisible content and related bugs

requirements.text: Fix the design group row cards in the Total Orders tab (and all other dashboard tabs) where card content is invisible due to dark text rendering on a dark background. Ensure all text, labels, design codes, weights, quantities, and action elements inside each row card are visible with appropriate contrast against the dark card background.

quotes: the design group rows below the tabs are rendering as dark empty boxes with no visible content
Row card content invisible — dark text on dark background in design group rows (the empty dark boxes in IMG_6556)

acceptanceCriteria: Design group row cards in Total Orders tab display all text content (design code, generic name, order count, weight) visibly
Row card content is readable with sufficient contrast against the dark card background
All other tabs (Ready, Hallmark, Customer Orders, Karigars) also render row card content visibly
No dark-on-dark text rendering anywhere in the dashboard row cards

requirements.text: Fix the Totals tab karigar name display so it shows the correct karigar name (e.g., ZYRA FACTORY) from the live design mappings instead of a stale/incorrect name (e.g., SANTU). Ensure karigar names in grouped rows reflect the current mapping data.

quotes: Karigar name sync — still showing SANTU instead of ZYRA FACTORY in Totals tab

acceptanceCriteria: Totals tab groups orders using the latest karigar name from the live design mappings query
Updated karigar names (e.g., ZYRA FACTORY) are reflected immediately after mappings are refreshed
No stale karigar name (e.g., SANTU) appears when the mapping has been updated

requirements.text: Fix the Karigars tab so that clicking a karigar card navigates to the karigar detail page and loads that karigar's pending orders correctly. The click handler must pass the correct karigar name and route parameters.

quotes: Karigar tab click — not loading pending orders when clicking a karigar card

acceptanceCriteria: Clicking a karigar card in the Karigars tab navigates to the karigar detail page
The karigar detail page loads and displays the correct pending orders for the selected karigar
No empty or broken state appears after clicking a karigar card

requirements.text: Fix the Ready tab to display export buttons (Excel, PDF, JPEG) so users can export orders from that tab. Ensure the export controls are rendered and functional in the Ready tab UI.

quotes: Export buttons on Ready tab — missing export options

acceptanceCriteria: Ready tab shows Excel, PDF, and JPEG export buttons
Export buttons trigger their respective export actions (download CSV/Excel, generate PDF, generate JPEG)
Export buttons are visible and accessible without scrolling or additional interactions

constraints: Do not change backend data models or Motoko actor logic
Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/components/ui/
nonGoals: Adding new dashboard tabs or features
Changing the overall dark theme or color palette
